science.title: Astronomers finally solve the gamma-Cas X-ray mystery after 50 years

science.title: Scientists catch antimatter “atom” acting like a wave for the first time

science.title: Surprising obesity discovery rewrites decades of fat metabolism science
science.summary: A key protein involved in fat metabolism has been found to do more than scientists once thought. Instead of just releasing fat, it helps maintain healthy fat tissue and balance in the body. When it’s missing or disrupted, the results can be surprisingly harmful.
